title: dissanthelium calycinum subsp. mathewsii
intro: Dissanthelium calycinum subsp. mathewsii is a subspecies of grass found in North America, specifically in the mountainous regions of the western United States and southwestern Canada. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. Dissanthelium calycinum subsp. mathewsii has been reported to have various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its potential health benefits.
